sql_array: CREATE TABLE base58_test (encoded String, decoded String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY encoded;
INSERT INTO base58_test (encoded, decoded) VALUES ('3dc8KtHrwM', tryBase58Decode('3dc8KtHrwM'));
INSERT INTO base58_test (encoded, decoded) VALUES ('invalid', tryBase58Decode('invalid'));
SELECT encoded, decoded FROM base58_test WHERE decoded != '';
UPDATE base58_test SET decoded = tryBase58Decode(encoded) WHERE encoded LIKE '3%';
